title: PEDIATRIC HEALTH - 211info
text: ROGUE RIVER HEALTH CENTER PEDIATRIC HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers pediatric medical and behavioral health services. Services include well-child checkups, immunizations, treatment for illness or injury, vision and hearing screenings, sports physicals and mental health counseling. May offer referrals for dental and specialty care. 225 Oak Street Rogue River, OR 97537 Eligibility: Children and teens ages 2-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 507-8550 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 507-8550 Main phone Main phone (541) 507-8550 FAX (541) 494-1789 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees based on income and family size for patients with no health insurance. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Childhood Immunization Hearing Screening * Pediatric Patients Pediatrics Sports Participation Physical Examinations If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE RIVER HEALTH CENTER
